name: Orange Worms
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Apricot halves packed in light syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wiggle these worms any way you want on your plate. If desired, add "eyes" made from licorice bits.
2. Place apricots in a colander and let drain.
3. Place drained apricots in a food processor, cover, and whirl until well blended.
4. Place gelatin in a 3-quart pan, add orange juice, and let stand for 5 minutes to soften the gelatin.
5. Place pan on burner and bring mixture to a boil over medium/high heat, stirring with a whisk.
6. Turn off the burner and remove pan from the heat.
7. Add apricots and mix until well blended.
8. Pour into a baking pan, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for about 4 hours, until set.
9. Use a butter knife to cut gelatin crosswise into 9-inch long, 1-inch wide strips (about 13 strips).
10. Use a pancake turner to remove strips to serving plate.
11. Use your hands to twist the strips into worm shapes.
12. Makes 13 worms.
